arts.ttl: Leeds’ rivals Sunderland played against 12-men Preston
arts.sum: All of the top four had home fixtures this weekend with Leeds playing tonight against Millwall, having to respond to whatever Sheffield United, Burnley, and Sunderland did on Tuesday. Leeds United were handed a boost last night when all three of the sides directly behind them failed to win at home, including Sunderland needing a late equaliser at home to Preston.

arts.ttl: Joel Piroe warning, Leeds United player on brink of ban, mental Millwall mission
arts.sum: Farke noted that both occasions cannot be related to today’s match given the reverse league game was under a different manager and the cup clash involved a heavily rotated Leeds side. Players in the EFL are required to sit out two matches if they tally 10 yellow cards by matchday 37 - which, for Leeds, comes against Millwall on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur similarities clear for Leeds United homegrown star as 'another level' comment made
arts.sum: When it comes to making a move from Leeds United to Tottenham Hotpsur as a teenage star tipped for the top, Aaron Lennon knows all about the pressure and expectation that Archie Gray is feeling. Lennon has watched Gray's development at Leeds closely, but even he says he has been surprised by how good the teenager has been this season for Ange Postecoglou's side.

arts.ttl: Prutton wowed by Leeds’ “incredible” Dan James
arts.sum: Helping Leeds boast the best attacking output in the league this season is right-winger Dan James, sitting on 10 goals and nine assist so far under Farke. Leeds United have found superb form in front of goal from Dan James in the past two seasons, and it’s something that could help them go over the line for promotion.

arts.ttl: 'Ruthless' Dan James has become the key man in Leeds push for PL
arts.sum: When Crysencio Summerville and Georginio Rutter departed, it was expected that Willy Gnonto would become their key player this season.

arts.ttl: Ramsey, Ampadu and Wilson missing for Wales' WC qualifiers
arts.sum: Aaron Ramsey's heartbreaking battle with injuries has once again seen him withdraw from a Wales squad - this time just hours before he was due to return as part of Craig Bellamy's 26-player party for the forthcoming qualifiers against Kazakhstan and North Macedonia.

arts.ttl: Leeds 'could become Rangers' FEEDER club' as San Francisco 49ers chiefs hatch plan
arts.sum: Rangers are subject to a takeover led by chiefs at NFL team San Francisco 49ers as they bid to overhaul the Scottish giants, and ex-player Graeme Souness believes Leeds United could soon become a feeder team for the Gers

arts.ttl: Leeds v Millwall: Will Ramazani finally start?
arts.sum: Leeds United take on Millwall this evening looking to retain their position at the top of the Championship after their unbeaten run came to an end on Sunday. Brenden Aaronson has been an undisputed part of Farke’s starting lineup virtually ever since he came back from his loan, but his output in the final third has left a lot to be desired.

arts.ttl: ‘Very good player’ – David Prutton delivers verdict on Leeds United attacker who has ‘impressed’ him this season
arts.sum: Leeds United winger Dan James has ‘impressed’ Sky Sports’ David Prutton this season. Leeds United are eyeing promotion… The post ‘Very good player’ – David Prutton delivers verdict on Leeds United attacker who has ‘impressed’ him this season appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Spotted: Leeds teen duo Chadwick, McDonald impress
arts.sum: Leeds United’s U21s claimed victory over Aldershot in the National League Cup on Tuesday night thanks to two more goals from Rhys Chadwick, either side of an Ollie Pickles strike. It was the same old story for Leeds’ U21 side this season as talented 18-year-old midfielder Rhys Chadwick continued to add to his stunning goal tally this season with a brace.
